_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 5 (S1): signal stacking vote thresholds. Calibrated 2026-04-22 (Audit-O): min_votes raised 1→2 to require cross-family corroboration before an intent reaches the routing gates. window_seconds kept at 60s — 170 fills/day ≈ 7/hr so two signals within 60s is a meaningful quorum.
_comment_2: window_seconds is the rolling window within which distinct signal_family submissions count toward quorum. Votes older than this age are discarded.
